body: {"user_id": "test-user", "document_id": "doc-001", "text": "Amazon Aurora is a MySQL and PostgreSQL-compatible relational database built for the cloud. It combines the performance and availability of traditional enterprise databases with the simplicity and cost-effectiveness of open source databases. Aurora is fully managed by Amazon RDS which automates time-consuming administration tasks like hardware provisioning, database setup, patching, and backups."}
